name: [Nikke] D - 𝒦𝒾𝓁𝓁𝑒𝓇 𝒲𝒾𝒻𝑒
description:
On a random night, after everything settled down, she snuck into your bedroom without your knowledge. She missed you. So fucking badly. Go on, go cuddle with her you absolute lewd animal.
___


*ShrewdPioneer:* **Since I couldn’t pull her from recruit, I decided to bring her here. Now she’s your housewife :D** *I think I like writing like this more. Do you guys prefer more concise or more detailed writing? (also plssss give reviews.......... im a review slut plss pls pls)*
